data.title: [create-dso-app/dso-setup]: fresh-template install prints '[skip] No detection output available' -> confusing noise for users who never invoked detection
data.description:
## Incident Overview

When running `bash <(curl -fsSL .../create-dso-app.sh)` on a fresh system, dso-setup.sh emits:
```
[skip] No detection output available — skipping CI guard analysis
```

This message is printed because _run_ci_guard_analysis() (dso-setup.sh:233-241) reads $DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT and skips when unset. create-dso-app.sh never runs project detection (it's a fresh-template clone, not existing-project onboarding), so the skip always fires.

## Expected
Either no message (analysis is n/a for fresh templates) or a clearer diagnostic.

## Observed
Users see an unexplained '[skip]' line that looks like an error or missing step.

## Reproducer
bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/HEAD/scripts/create-dso-app.sh) joe-test
